{{Quote|He attended the All Science Research Academy on Yerphonia.|Jocasta Nu, on Granta Omega|<ref name="JQ" />}}
'''Yerphonia''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="JQ" /> located in the [[Yerphonia system/Legends|Yerphonia system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA Yerphonia" /> It was the site of the prestigious [[All Science Research Academy]].<ref name="CSWE" />

The [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> future entrepreneur [[Granta Omega]], who [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nierport VII]] in<ref name="JQ" /> the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies']]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Eeropha system]], attended the institution on Yerphonia thanks to sponsorship by<ref name="JQ" /> the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]<ref name="TERC" /> [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Sano Sauro]]. Omega graduated from the academy<ref name="JQ" /> around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], shortly before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]],<ref name="Date">''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'', the events of which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], establishes that [[Granta Omega]] graduated from the [[All Science Research Academy]] seven [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior. In addition, {{CSWECite|I|22|All Science Research Academy}} further narrows down the time of the graduation to shortly before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], which took place in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> a fact that [[Jedi archivist/Legends|archivist]] [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]] of<ref name="JQ" /> the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Archives]]<ref name="CVD">''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> uncovered [[25 BBY/Legends|seven years]] later and subsequently relayed to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who was searching for Omega at the time.<ref name="JQ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yerphonia was first mentioned in [[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise|''The Master of Disguise'']], the [[2002]] fourth entry in [[Jude Watson]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Quest]]'' series of young reader novels.<ref name="JQ" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Yerphonia [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Yerphonia itself, in grid square L-9.<ref name="TEA Yerphonia" />
